about.title: About SOLIDARITY
about.description: SOLIDARITY is a non-profit organization based in Cameroon, committed to the education and well-being of vulnerable children. We act concretely to remove the obstacles that hinder their academic success: distribution of school supplies, educational support, cultural and sports activities, awareness actions and advocacy for the protection of children's rights. Our conviction is simple: every child deserves a fair chance to succeed. Thanks to the solidarity of our members, partners and donors, we build a lasting impact in service of children and their future.
about.founder_story:
This project was divinely inspired to me. Hebrews 13: 1-2 — Keep on loving one another as brothers and sisters. Do not forget to show hospitality to strangers, for by so doing some people have shown hospitality to angels without knowing it.

I come from a family of 5, the youngest and unfortunately fatherless since the age of 14. From my adolescence until I was 24, I had the grace of being supported by close family friends. School, basic needs, etc… I was not in an orphanage but I needed this support.

With hindsight, I later measured how lucky I was to have such good people around me. So I decided to do the same.

As soon as I got my first job, I started helping children. It started with 2, then 52 and today hundreds of children in need receive school kits every year. This is possible thanks to the many donations from my friends, family and acquaintances.
about.vision_text: Support the education of millions of Cameroonian children.
about.mission_text: The mission of SOLIDARITY is to contribute to improving the living and learning conditions of vulnerable children in Cameroon.

actions.title: Our Actions
actions.subtitle: Every action counts. Together, we make a difference.
actions.kits_desc: Every year, we distribute complete school kits to enrolled children who need them. These kits include notebooks, pens, rulers, and all the materials needed for a successful school year.
actions.coaching_desc: Our potential awakening sessions help young people discover their talents, strengthen their self-confidence and develop skills for their future.
actions.meals_desc: Because no one should go to bed hungry, we organize meal distributions to people in precarious situations on the streets of Douala.

partnerships.title: Our Partnerships
partnerships.subtitle: Solidarity also means joining forces for greater impact.
partnerships.born_to_shine_desc: Born To Shine is our associative partner with whom we share the same vision: giving children the best chances of success.
partnerships.join_desc: Are you a company, association or organization that shares our values? Join our network of partners and help change lives.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Every day, many children face difficulties that hinder their academic journey.
mission.content: SOLIDARITY acts to remove these obstacles through:
mission.action3: Implementation of cultural, sports and fulfillment activities
mission.action4: Awareness and advocacy actions in favor of children's rights
mission.approach_text: We adopt a human, inclusive and sustainable approach. Every child is unique, every situation deserves special attention. It is with this mindset that we build, day after day, a better future for Cameroonian children.

members.title: Our Members
members.subtitle: Committed people, united by the same conviction.

support.subtitle: There are many ways to support us. Every gesture counts.
